prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Block/brick laying, part of the Concrete & Masonry scope. The observed field condition is: head joints unfilled (visible voids). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: TMS 402/602.
title: Compliance check: Block/brick laying (commercial project)
